name: Phrae retail and civic core
notes: City retail-government-hospital cluster including Big C, bus terminal, fresh market, and civic activity where destination charging should be stronger than old-town tourism alone.

name: Phrae south retail edge / Global House
notes: Mueang/Sung Men edge retail cluster with verified EA Anywhere host behavior and strong practical stopover demand from city-south traffic.

name: Den Chai route and rail gateway
notes: Route 11/101 plus rail gateway area where fast charging should respond to through-travel, fuel-stop behavior, and hospital/service anchors.

name: Route 101 north connector / Nong Ha - Rong Kwang side
notes: North-side Route 101 corridor and district movement beyond the city core; useful to stop heat from collapsing too fast outside Mueang.
